title: mallotus muticus
intro: Mallotus muticus, also known as the Malayan kerang or Riddhi, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mallotus muticus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Mallotus muticus is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal and health benefits, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
